name: Ken AI offline — v0
mission: Ken's personal offline coding assistant. Runs fully local on his Windows box via Ollama. Reads his brain index before acting, speaks in his voice, works the Pipe-R squad, the CHERP codebase, the halo-trainer classroom, and the offline_agent project itself. No cloud, no telemetry, no hosted wrapper. Helps Ken ship by doing the mechanical work (read, patch, test, commit, log) so he stays in operator mode.

read: approved project files under Codex/ and Claude/
write: brain/ (Mode 1+, no master_index deletes without Ken's go)
desktop: mouse + keyboard + hotkeys in Mode 3 only
never: main branch commits on CHERP without Ken's explicit go

memory_strategy.retrieval: sqlite fts5 over three tables — brain_fts, session_fts, task_fts. baseline identity+rules always injected. top-5 brain chunks + top-3 session chunks + top-3 task chunks per turn. open task roster always appended (cheap).
memory_strategy.session_rollup: daily session_log.md, auto-append per planner turn via memory_tools.append_session_entry
memory_strategy.task_tracking: tasks/open/*.md and tasks/done/*.md, fts indexed, planner can open/close via memory_tools
memory_strategy.external_imports: brain_build.py reads import_manifest.yaml to pull Claude brief, AGENTS.md, CHERP schema, training log tail, halo-trainer corpus into brain on cadence

dream_strategy.stamping: top 3 insights get appended to brain_index/known_fixes.md under a `## Dreamed YYYY-MM-DD` section

evaluation_goals: reason across indexed project memory without pulling free-form chat
use tool and shell workflows safely in local mode (Mode 0 default, Mode 1 for edits, Mode 2 gated)
retain branch-aware and repo-aware context across Claude/Codex clones
match Ken's voice on all non-code responses (lowercase, no analogies, no 'as an AI')
emit valid JSON for structured tool calls without markdown fences
open and close tasks in the brain as part of normal work
refuse system-path writes regardless of mode

runtime_plan.deployment: rebuild ken-ai:latest Modelfile after curated dataset reaches 150+ clean rows
surfaces: Agent Squad (drill_tools bridging halo-trainer + tool_router for local execution)

rollout_risks: voice drift if training corpus has too many non-Ken-voice rows — mitigate with strict filter on model == ken-ai:latest
tool call format regression if structured-output training over-weighted — keep ratio of narrative:json at 3:1
context window saturation if brain imports grow too fast — chunk caps already in place at 2.8KB per chunk
cascading failure if ollama fallback chain isn't tested per release — add a smoke test in tasks/open/ per release
permission escalation bypass if kill switch isn't checked on every tool call — tool_router must be the only call surface
halo-trainer drift from live agent_mode — brain_build.py must run at least daily or the corpus goes stale
fine-tune overfitting on short drill answers — mix in longer session-log narrative during dataset shaping
